meta.notes: Finnish household electricity — average for "> 15,000 kWh" annual consumption, from Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus), StatFin table 13rb. All-in 14.13 c/kWh = electric energy 5.34 + distribution 3.67 + taxes (electricity tax + VAT) 5.12. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — attribute Statistics Finland. A statistical average, not a shoppable plan.
